allow: Bash(which potrace vtracer autotrace inkscape convert 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; dpkg -l | grep -i potrace 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; pip list 2>/dev/null | grep -i svg)

Bash(which python3 && python3 -c "import PIL; print\('Pillow:', PIL.__version__\)" 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; which magick || which convert 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; apt list --installed 2>/dev/null | grep -E "potrace|imagemagick|inkscape" 2>/dev/null)
Bash(pnpm list next axios lodash lodash-es ajv minimatch qs @isaacs/brace-expansion 2>/dev/null || npm ls next axios lodash lodash-es ajv minimatch qs @isaacs/brace-expansion 2>/dev/null)

Bash(git add package.json pnpm-lock.yaml && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
fix security vulnerabilities flagged by dependabot

Bump next 16.1.1 → 16.1.6 and add pnpm overrides for transitive deps
\(lodash, axios, minimatch, @isaacs/brace-expansion, ajv, rollup, qs\).
Resolves all 12 known CVEs \(6 high, 5 moderate, 1 low\).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git status)
Bash(echo "fix security vulnerabilities flagged by dependabot" | pnpm commitlint 2>&1)
Bash(echo "fix: security vulnerabilities flagged by dependabot" | pnpm commitlint 2>&1)

Bash(git add .husky/pre-commit .husky/commit-msg package.json src/app src/features src/lib && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
fix: resolve lint errors and restore git hooks

Fix 14 biome lint/format errors across 12 source files, remove unused
`payment` variable from lesson assignment transaction, update lint:fix
script for biome v2, and re-enable pre-commit \(lint-staged\) and
commit-msg \(commitlint\) hooks that were previously disabled.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(git add .claude/settings.local.json && git commit -m "chore: update local claude settings" 2>&1)
Bash(git add .husky/pre-commit .husky/commit-msg && git commit -m "fix: quiet git hooks for VS Code compatibility" 2>&1)
Bash(git add .husky/pre-commit && git commit -m "fix: silence lint-staged output for VS Code" 2>&1)
Bash(env | grep -i "VSCODE\\|TERM_PROGRAM\\|GIT_EXEC" 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; git config --list | grep -i hook 2>/dev/null)
Bash(git add .husky/pre-commit .husky/commit-msg && git commit -m "fix: skip git hooks in VS Code UI, run on terminal only" 2>&1)
